A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving Swift files from contents (query_db:20), the agent parsed copy counts in execute_python:22 using a regex that missed common phrasings like "appears" and "seen," leading to undercounted maxima and returning uacaps/PageMenu instead of the true highest-copy file’s repository (SwiftAndroid/swift).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After finding the most frequently copied Swift file by parsing contents.repo_data_description (from query_db:16 and execute_python:22), the agent incorrectly returned contents.sample_repo_name (confirmed via query_db:24) instead of joining the files table on the file id to determine the actual repositories containing that blob, leading it to pick onmyway133/Github.swift rather than the ground-truth SwiftAndroid/swift.

After querying contents for Swift files with "times" in repo_data_description (e.g., functions.query_db:10) but repeatedly failing to process and compute the maximum due to multiple execute_python SyntaxErrors, the agent guessed "slavapestov/swift" from previewed rows instead of correctly computing across all data (and ensuring unique file IDs), leading to the wrong repository.

The agent computed the most-copied non-binary Swift file from contents (query_db:20) and simply returned its sample_repo_name via execute_python:24, without joining to the languages table to restrict to Swift-language repositories, leading to "kostiakoval/Mirror" instead of the correct "SwiftAndroid/swift".
